---
title: "Survival Distribution Explorer"
knit: litedown:::knit
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Survival Distribution Explorer}
  %\VignetteEngine{litedown::vignette}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
## Load chart.js + the litedown tabsets helpers in a way that works
## under both engines:
##   - pkgdown / rmarkdown: rendered as raw HTML below.
##   - litedown::vignette : the vest() call also runs (it is a no-op
##     under rmarkdown apart from the printed comment we suppress).
if (requireNamespace("litedown", quietly = TRUE) &&
    isTRUE(getOption("litedown.knitting"))) {
  litedown::vest(
    css = c("@default", "@tabsets"),
    js  = c("@tabsets", "@npm/chart.js")
  )
}
```

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.5.1" defer></script>
```

```{css, echo = FALSE}
:root {
  --panel-bg: #f6f7f8;
  --panel-border: #d7dbe0;
  --panel-text: #1a1f24;
  --accent: #0f7b6c;
}

.controls {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  padding: 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--panel-bg);
  color: var(--panel-text);
  margin: 12px 0;
}

.controls fieldset {
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 8px 12px 12px;
}

.controls legend {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.controls label {
  display: block;
  margin: 6px 0;
}

.controls input[type="number"],
.controls input[type="text"] {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 6px 8px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
  background: #fff;
}

.controls input[type="range"] {
  width: 100%;
}

.chart-wrap {
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 12px;
  background: #fff;
}

.small-note {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #4b4f55;
}

.param-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.param-table th,
.param-table td {
  padding: 6px 8px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
}

.param-table th {
  text-align: left;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.param-table input[type="number"] {
  width: 100%;
}

.action-btn {
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--panel-border);
  background: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.action-btn:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  color: var(--accent);
}
```

## Overview

This interactive vignette lets you explore the five survival distributions in
`vldaft` on the accelerated failure time (AFT) log-time scale. You can compare
families matched on the 25th and 75th percentiles, or compare multiple parameter
sets within a single family. Toggle between CDF, PDF, and hazard rate.

**AFT parameterization:** $w = (\log t - \mu) / \sigma$. All curves below are
computed from the standardized error distribution on $w$, then mapped to time $t$.

## Explorer {.tabset}

### Compare families

<div class="controls" id="controls-compare">
  <fieldset>
    <legend>Distributions</legend>
    <label><input type="checkbox" data-dist="weibull" checked> Weibull</label>
    <label><input type="checkbox" data-dist="logistic" checked> Logistic</label>
    <label><input type="checkbox" data-dist="normal" checked> Normal</label>
    <label><input type="checkbox" data-dist="cauchy"> Cauchy</label>
    <label><input type="checkbox" data-dist="gamma"> Gamma</label>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Match quantiles</legend>
    <label>t25
      <input type="number" id="q25" min="0.001" step="0.1" value="5">
    </label>
    <label>t75
      <input type="number" id="q75" min="0.001" step="0.1" value="20">
    </label>
    <div class="small-note">All selected distributions match these percentiles.</div>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Axis limits</legend>
    <label>x max
      <input type="number" id="xmax-compare" min="0.01" step="0.1" placeholder="auto">
    </label>
    <label>y max
      <input type="number" id="ymax-compare" min="0.001" step="0.1" placeholder="auto">
    </label>
    <button class="action-btn" id="reset-compare" type="button">Reset limits</button>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Display</legend>
    <label><input type="radio" name="view-compare" value="cdf" checked> CDF</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="view-compare" value="pdf"> PDF</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="view-compare" value="hazard"> Hazard rate</label>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset id="gamma-panel">
    <legend>Gamma shape</legend>
    <label>nu
      <input type="range" id="gamma-nu" min="-1" max="2" step="0.1" value="0">
    </label>
    <div class="small-note">Shape = exp(nu)</div>
  </fieldset>
</div>

<div class="chart-wrap">
  <canvas id="chart-compare" height="280"></canvas>
</div>

### Compare parameters

<div class="controls" id="controls-params">
  <fieldset>
    <legend>Family</legend>
    <label><input type="radio" name="family" value="weibull" checked> Weibull</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="family" value="logistic"> Logistic</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="family" value="normal"> Normal</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="family" value="cauchy"> Cauchy</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="family" value="gamma"> Gamma</label>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Display</legend>
    <label><input type="radio" name="view-params" value="cdf" checked> CDF</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="view-params" value="pdf"> PDF</label>
    <label><input type="radio" name="view-params" value="hazard"> Hazard rate</label>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Rows</legend>
    <button class="action-btn" id="add-row" type="button">Add row</button>
    <button class="action-btn" id="remove-row" type="button">Remove row</button>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Axis limits</legend>
    <label>x max
      <input type="number" id="xmax-params" min="0.01" step="0.1" placeholder="auto">
    </label>
    <label>y max
      <input type="number" id="ymax-params" min="0.001" step="0.1" placeholder="auto">
    </label>
    <button class="action-btn" id="reset-params" type="button">Reset limits</button>
  </fieldset>
</div>

<table class="param-table" id="param-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Label</th>
      <th>mu</th>
      <th>sigma</th>
      <th class="gamma-col">nu</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody></tbody>
</table>

<div class="chart-wrap">
  <canvas id="chart-params" height="280"></canvas>
</div>

```{js, type = "module", echo = FALSE}
const COLORS = [
  "#0f7b6c",
  "#2f5aa4",
  "#b3415f",
  "#d28d26",
  "#6f4bc1",
  "#2f8d50"
];

const distLabels = {
  weibull: "Weibull",
  logistic: "Logistic",
  normal: "Normal",
  cauchy: "Cauchy",
  gamma: "Gamma"
};

const SQRT_2PI = Math.sqrt(2 * Math.PI);
const TINY = 1e-12;

function log1pExp(x) {
  if (x > 0) return x + Math.log1p(Math.exp(-x));
  return Math.log1p(Math.exp(x));
}

function normCdf(x) {
  // Abramowitz & Stegun 7.1.26
  const sign = x < 0 ? -1 : 1;
  const z = Math.abs(x) / Math.sqrt(2);
  const t = 1 / (1 + 0.3275911 * z);
  const a1 = 0.254829592;
  const a2 = -0.284496736;
  const a3 = 1.421413741;
  const a4 = -1.453152027;
  const a5 = 1.061405429;
  const erf = 1 - (((((a5 * t + a4) * t) + a3) * t + a2) * t + a1) * t * Math.exp(-z * z);
  return 0.5 * (1 + sign * erf);
}

function normInv(p) {
  // Acklam approximation
  if (p <= 0 || p >= 1) return NaN;
  const a = [
    -3.969683028665376e+01,
     2.209460984245205e+02,
    -2.759285104469687e+02,
     1.383577518672690e+02,
    -3.066479806614716e+01,
     2.506628277459239e+00
  ];
  const b = [
    -5.447609879822406e+01,
     1.615858368580409e+02,
    -1.556989798598866e+02,
     6.680131188771972e+01,
    -1.328068155288572e+01
  ];
  const c = [
    -7.784894002430293e-03,
    -3.223964580411365e-01,
    -2.400758277161838e+00,
    -2.549732539343734e+00,
     4.374664141464968e+00,
     2.938163982698783e+00
  ];
  const d = [
     7.784695709041462e-03,
     3.224671290700398e-01,
     2.445134137142996e+00,
     3.754408661907416e+00
  ];
  const plow = 0.02425;
  const phigh = 1 - plow;
  let q, r;
  if (p < plow) {
    q = Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(p));
    return (((((c[0] * q + c[1]) * q + c[2]) * q + c[3]) * q + c[4]) * q + c[5]) /
           ((((d[0] * q + d[1]) * q + d[2]) * q + d[3]) * q + 1);
  }
  if (p > phigh) {
    q = Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(1 - p));
    return -(((((c[0] * q + c[1]) * q + c[2]) * q + c[3]) * q + c[4]) * q + c[5]) /
            ((((d[0] * q + d[1]) * q + d[2]) * q + d[3]) * q + 1);
  }
  q = p - 0.5;
  r = q * q;
  return (((((a[0] * r + a[1]) * r + a[2]) * r + a[3]) * r + a[4]) * r + a[5]) * q /
         (((((b[0] * r + b[1]) * r + b[2]) * r + b[3]) * r + b[4]) * r + 1);
}

function logGamma(z) {
  // Lanczos approximation
  const p = [
    0.99999999999980993,
    676.5203681218851,
    -1259.1392167224028,
    771.32342877765313,
    -176.61502916214059,
    12.507343278686905,
    -0.13857109526572012,
    9.9843695780195716e-6,
    1.5056327351493116e-7
  ];
  if (z < 0.5) {
    return Math.log(Math.PI) - Math.log(Math.sin(Math.PI * z)) - logGamma(1 - z);
  }
  z -= 1;
  let x = p[0];
  for (let i = 1; i < p.length; i += 1) x += p[i] / (z + i);
  const t = z + 7.5;
  return 0.5 * Math.log(2 * Math.PI) + (z + 0.5) * Math.log(t) - t + Math.log(x);
}

function gammaP(a, x) {
  if (x <= 0) return 0;
  if (x < a + 1) {
    let ap = a;
    let sum = 1 / a;
    let del = sum;
    for (let n = 1; n <= 200; n += 1) {
      ap += 1;
      del *= x / ap;
      sum += del;
      if (Math.abs(del) < Math.abs(sum) * 1e-12) break;
    }
    return sum * Math.exp(-x + a * Math.log(x) - logGamma(a));
  }
  return 1 - gammaQ(a, x);
}

function gammaQ(a, x) {
  if (x <= 0) return 1;
  let b = x + 1 - a;
  let c = 1 / 1e-30;
  let d = 1 / b;
  let h = d;
  for (let i = 1; i <= 200; i += 1) {
    const an = -i * (i - a);
    b += 2;
    d = an * d + b;
    if (Math.abs(d) < 1e-30) d = 1e-30;
    c = b + an / c;
    if (Math.abs(c) < 1e-30) c = 1e-30;
    d = 1 / d;
    const del = d * c;
    h *= del;
    if (Math.abs(del - 1) < 1e-12) break;
  }
  return Math.exp(-x + a * Math.log(x) - logGamma(a)) * h;
}

function logPdfW(w, dist, nu) {
  switch (dist) {
    case "weibull":
      return w - Math.exp(w);
    case "logistic":
      return w - 2 * log1pExp(w);
    case "normal":
      return -0.5 * w * w - Math.log(SQRT_2PI);
    case "cauchy":
      return -Math.log(Math.PI) - Math.log1p(w * w);
    case "gamma": {
      const a = Math.exp(nu);
      const u = Math.exp(a * w + nu);
      return nu + a * (nu + w) - u - logGamma(a);
    }
    default:
      return NaN;
  }
}

function logSurvW(w, dist, nu) {
  switch (dist) {
    case "weibull":
      return -Math.exp(w);
    case "logistic":
      return -log1pExp(w);
    case "normal": {
      const p = 1 - normCdf(w);
      if (p > 0) return Math.log(p);
      // asymptotic for large w
      return -0.5 * w * w - Math.log(w) - Math.log(SQRT_2PI);
    }
    case "cauchy": {
      const s = 0.5 - Math.atan(w) / Math.PI;
      return Math.log(Math.max(s, TINY));
    }
    case "gamma": {
      const a = Math.exp(nu);
      const u = Math.exp(a * w + nu);
      const s = gammaQ(a, u);
      return Math.log(Math.max(s, TINY));
    }
    default:
      return NaN;
  }
}

function invSurv(s, dist, nu) {
  if (s <= 0 || s >= 1) return NaN;
  switch (dist) {
    case "weibull":
      return Math.log(-Math.log(s));
    case "logistic":
      return Math.log(1 / s - 1);
    case "normal":
      return normInv(1 - s);
    case "cauchy":
      return Math.tan(Math.PI * (0.5 - s));
    case "gamma": {
      let lo = -8;
      let hi = 8;
      for (let i = 0; i < 50; i += 1) {
        if (Math.exp(Math.exp(nu) * lo + nu) < 1e-10) break;
        lo -= 1;
      }
      for (let i = 0; i < 50; i += 1) {
        const a = Math.exp(nu);
        const u = Math.exp(a * hi + nu);
        if (gammaQ(a, u) < s) break;
        hi += 1;
      }
      for (let i = 0; i < 80; i += 1) {
        const mid = 0.5 * (lo + hi);
        const a = Math.exp(nu);
        const u = Math.exp(a * mid + nu);
        const smid = gammaQ(a, u);
        if (smid > s) lo = mid; else hi = mid;
        if (Math.abs(hi - lo) < 1e-6) break;
      }
      return 0.5 * (lo + hi);
    }
    default:
      return NaN;
  }
}

function gridW(dist, nu) {
  const wLo = invSurv(0.99, dist, nu);
  const wHi = invSurv(0.01, dist, nu);
  return { wLo, wHi };
}

function seriesData(dist, mu, sigma, nu, view) {
  const sig = Math.max(sigma, 1e-6);
  const { wLo, wHi } = gridW(dist, nu);
  const n = 200;
  const xs = [];
  const ys = [];
  for (let i = 0; i <= n; i += 1) {
    const w = wLo + (wHi - wLo) * i / n;
    const t = Math.exp(mu + sig * w);
    const logf = logPdfW(w, dist, nu);
    const logS = logSurvW(w, dist, nu);
    if (!isFinite(t) || !isFinite(logf) || !isFinite(logS)) continue;
    if (view === "cdf") {
      const s = Math.exp(logS);
      xs.push(t);
      ys.push(1 - s);
    } else if (view === "pdf") {
      const logft = logf - Math.log(t) - Math.log(sig);
      xs.push(t);
      ys.push(Math.exp(logft));
    } else {
      const logft = logf - Math.log(t) - Math.log(sig);
      const logh = logft - logS;
      xs.push(t);
      ys.push(Math.exp(logh));
    }
  }
  return { xs, ys };
}

function matchMuSigma(t25, t75, dist, nu) {
  if (!(t25 > 0 && t75 > t25)) return null;
  const w25 = invSurv(0.75, dist, nu);
  const w75 = invSurv(0.25, dist, nu);
  const sigma = (Math.log(t75) - Math.log(t25)) / (w75 - w25);
  const mu = Math.log(t25) - sigma * w25;
  return { mu, sigma };
}

function makeChart(ctx) {
  return new Chart(ctx, {
    type: "line",
    data: { datasets: [] },
    options: {
      responsive: true,
      animation: false,
      parsing: false,
      scales: {
        x: {
          type: "linear",
          title: { display: true, text: "Time (t)" }
        },
        y: {
          title: { display: true, text: "Value" }
        }
      },
      plugins: {
        legend: { display: true }
      }
    }
  });
}

function updateChart(chart, seriesList, view, xMax, yMax) {
  chart.data.datasets = seriesList.map((s, idx) => ({
    label: s.label,
    data: s.xs.map((x, i) => ({ x, y: s.ys[i] })),
    borderColor: COLORS[idx % COLORS.length],
    backgroundColor: COLORS[idx % COLORS.length],
    borderWidth: 2,
    fill: false,
    pointRadius: 0
  }));
  chart.options.scales.y.title.text = view === "cdf" ? "CDF" : (view === "pdf" ? "PDF" : "Hazard rate");
  chart.options.scales.x.max = xMax;
  chart.options.scales.y.max = yMax;
  chart.update();
}

const compareChart = makeChart(document.getElementById("chart-compare"));
const paramsChart = makeChart(document.getElementById("chart-params"));

function updateCompare() {
  const selected = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#controls-compare input[type=checkbox]")
    ).filter(el => el.checked).map(el => el.dataset.dist);
  const t25 = parseFloat(document.getElementById("q25").value || "5");
  const t75 = parseFloat(document.getElementById("q75").value || "20");
  const nu = parseFloat(document.getElementById("gamma-nu").value || "0");
  const view = document.querySelector("input[name=view-compare]:checked").value;
  const xMax = parseLimit("xmax-compare");
  const yMax = parseLimit("ymax-compare");

  const gammaPanel = document.getElementById("gamma-panel");
  gammaPanel.style.display = selected.includes("gamma") ? "block" : "none";

  const series = [];
  selected.forEach((dist) => {
    const params = matchMuSigma(t25, t75, dist, nu);
    if (!params) return;
    const { mu, sigma } = params;
    const data = seriesData(dist, mu, sigma, nu, view);
    series.push({ label: distLabels[dist], xs: data.xs, ys: data.ys });
  });

  updateChart(compareChart, series, view, xMax, yMax);
  saveLimits("compare", xMax, yMax);
}

function addParamRow(label, mu, sigma, nu) {
  const tbody = document.querySelector("#param-table tbody");
  const tr = document.createElement("tr");
  tr.innerHTML = `
    <td><input type="text" value="${label}"></td>
    <td><input type="number" step="0.1" value="${mu}"></td>
    <td><input type="number" step="0.1" min="0.01" value="${sigma}"></td>
    <td class="gamma-col"><input type="number" step="0.1" value="${nu}"></td>
  `;
  tbody.appendChild(tr);
}

function updateGammaColumn() {
  const family = document.querySelector("input[name=family]:checked").value;
  const show = family === "gamma";
  document.querySelectorAll(".gamma-col").forEach((el) => {
    el.style.display = show ? "table-cell" : "none";
  });
}

function readParamRows() {
  const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("#param-table tbody tr"));
  return rows.map((row) => {
    const inputs = row.querySelectorAll("input");
    return {
      label: inputs[0].value || "set",
      mu: parseFloat(inputs[1].value || "0"),
      sigma: parseFloat(inputs[2].value || "1"),
      nu: parseFloat(inputs[3]?.value || "0")
    };
  });
}

function updateParams() {
  const family = document.querySelector("input[name=family]:checked").value;
  const view = document.querySelector("input[name=view-params]:checked").value;
  const xMax = parseLimit("xmax-params");
  const yMax = parseLimit("ymax-params");
  updateGammaColumn();
  const rows = readParamRows();
  const series = rows.map((row) => {
    const nu = family === "gamma" ? row.nu : 0;
    const data = seriesData(family, row.mu, row.sigma, nu, view);
    return { label: row.label, xs: data.xs, ys: data.ys };
  });
  updateChart(paramsChart, series, view, xMax, yMax);
  saveLimits("params", xMax, yMax);
}

function wireEvents() {
  document.querySelectorAll("#controls-compare input").forEach((el) => {
    el.addEventListener("input", updateCompare);
    el.addEventListener("change", updateCompare);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll("#controls-params input").forEach((el) => {
    el.addEventListener("input", updateParams);
    el.addEventListener("change", updateParams);
  });

  document.getElementById("add-row").addEventListener("click", () => {
    addParamRow("set", 0, 1, 0);
    updateParams();
  });

  document.getElementById("remove-row").addEventListener("click", () => {
    const tbody = document.querySelector("#param-table tbody");
    if (tbody.children.length > 1) tbody.removeChild(tbody.lastElementChild);
    updateParams();
  });

  document.getElementById("reset-compare").addEventListener("click", () => {
    setLimitInputs("compare", "", "");
    updateCompare();
  });

  document.getElementById("reset-params").addEventListener("click", () => {
    setLimitInputs("params", "", "");
    updateParams();
  });

  document.querySelector("#param-table tbody").addEventListener("input", updateParams);
}

function parseLimit(id) {
  const raw = document.getElementById(id).value;
  if (!raw) return undefined;
  const val = parseFloat(raw);
  return Number.isFinite(val) && val > 0 ? val : undefined;
}

function saveLimits(scope, xMax, yMax) {
  try {
    const payload = { xMax: xMax ?? null, yMax: yMax ?? null };
    localStorage.setItem(`vldaft-limits-${scope}`, JSON.stringify(payload));
  } catch (err) {
    // ignore storage errors
  }
}

function loadLimits(scope) {
  try {
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(`vldaft-limits-${scope}`);
    if (!raw) return null;
    return JSON.parse(raw);
  } catch (err) {
    return null;
  }
}

function setLimitInputs(scope, xVal, yVal) {
  const xInput = document.getElementById(`xmax-${scope}`);
  const yInput = document.getElementById(`ymax-${scope}`);
  if (xInput) xInput.value = xVal;
  if (yInput) yInput.value = yVal;
}

addParamRow("base", 0, 1, 0);
addParamRow("shifted", 0.5, 1, 0);
wireEvents();
updateGammaColumn();
const storedCompare = loadLimits("compare");
if (storedCompare) {
  setLimitInputs("compare", storedCompare.xMax ?? "", storedCompare.yMax ?? "");
}
const storedParams = loadLimits("params");
if (storedParams) {
  setLimitInputs("params", storedParams.xMax ?? "", storedParams.yMax ?? "");
}
updateCompare();
updateParams();
```
